content: {"text":"[mobilecode] {\"type\":\"mobilecode.action_evidence.v1\",\"task_id\":\"hm_task_project_check_001\",\"correlation_id\":\"corr_mobilecode_harvis_001\",\"action\":\"project_check\",\"status\":\"verified\",\"summary\":\"Protocol, status fixture, and evidence fixture are readable by Harvis without moving MobileCode execution into lark-relay.\",\"observations\":[{\"kind\":\"protocol\",\"status\":\"passed\",\"message\":\"Harvis task envelope uses approval-gated project_check.\"},{\"kind\":\"status_export\",\"status\":\"passed\",\"message\":\"MobileCode status can be rendered as Agent Room task state.\"},{\"kind\":\"evidence_export\",\"status\":\"passed\",\"message\":\"Action evidence can be converted to mobilecode.evidence.v1 for Lark relay write-back.\"}],\"artifacts\":[{\"kind\":\"json\",\"label\":\"readonly status\",\"ref\":\"examples/mobilecode-status.readonly.json\"}],\"redaction\":\"public_safe\",\"created_at\":\"2026-06-29T09:42:00Z\",\"next_action\":\"render_in_harvis_agent_room\"}"}
